headline: RESOLVED: copilot-pat-not-supported-400 incident (yesterday's CRITICAL production incident) is CLOSED. 4 in-window runs carried the 'Personal Access Tokens are not supported' signature but ALL concluded success on attempt 1 — harness now tolerates/retries past the token-check 400 (fix branch pelikhan/fix-pat-400-retry landed). Zero PAT-400-attributable failures (was ~15 yesterday). Success recovered toward baseline at 83.8% (30d avg 83.6%).
notes: All 6 failures copilot-engine; claude 9/9 and codex 2/2 clean. token-429 effective-cap ABSENT. Firewall 0.26% (proxy.golang.org only, by-design). Window PARTIAL (logs tool timeout at 97s, 38 of likely more runs).

window_kind: PARTIAL ~4.2h morning cluster; logs MCP tool timed out at 67s -> newest 48 runs with full run_summary captured; ~20h of 24h window unobserved (continuation available, before_run_id 27261842808).
engine_reliability: All 6 failures are copilot-engine agent failures EXCEPT Git Simulator (claude) whose AGENT succeeded (post-agent push step failed). claude agents 15/15 success, codex 1/1.
headline: 87.0% success (40/46). DOMINANT NEW class: docker-hub-registry-pull-timeout x2 (Windows Terminal, Hippo Learn) — node:lts-alpine pull from registry-1.docker.io times out exit 123, ghcr.io unaffected. cli-proxy DIFC liveness-probe-18443 RECUR day3 x2 (Sub-Issue Closer, Auto-Triage). NEW repo-memory signed-commit seeding gap reddened Git Simulator despite agent success. PAT-400 still resolved; daily-ai-credits-429 absent.

Observability flagged: auto-triage-issues 33% fail-rate hotspot, pr-sous-chef execution-drift 0-36 turns, daily-agentrx-trace-optimizer 12/71=17% firewall block (low absolute volume).
